category_title: Students with aggressive behaviors and impulse control difficulties who connect through animal-related interests
scenario_title: Group circle time with stuffed birds
minimal_context: The student is participating in group circle time where the teacher is demonstrating bird calls using stuffed-animal birds.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Everyone, please sit down for group circle time. We are going to look at these stuffed birds and listen to their calls.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Becomes frustrated during the transition to sitting in circle time, bringing a small accordion with him to the group.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's start with this first bird. Pay attention to the sound.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits in the circle holding the small accordion, watching the stuffed bird.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Squeezes the stuffed bird to demonstrate the call it makes) Listen closely.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Accurately mirrors the sound pattern of the bird with his small accordion, interrupting the group time.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Everyone, please sit down for group circle time. We are going to look at these stuffed birds and listen to their calls.

STUDENT: (Becomes frustrated during the transition to sitting in circle time, bringing a small accordion with him to the group.)

TUTOR: Let's start with this first bird. Pay attention to the sound.

STUDENT: (Sits in the circle holding the small accordion, watching the stuffed bird.)

TUTOR: (Squeezes the stuffed bird to demonstrate the call it makes) Listen closely.

STUDENT: (Accurately mirrors the sound pattern of the bird with his small accordion, interrupting the group time.)

task.content: Participating in group time where the teacher demonstrated bird calls using stuffed-animal birds

context.social_setting: group time with teacher and other children

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: As the teacher squeezed each bird to demonstrate the call it made
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: mirrored the sound pattern of each bird with the small accordion he had brought with him to group

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: musical accompaniment may have been viewed as an interruption
